description_en: San Francisco may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 51 halal restaurants and 4 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore San Francisco, the United States, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to San Francisco: 51+ halal restaurants, 4 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.5/5.
